description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have two jobs: Linting and Linux. The Linting job should run on ubuntu-latest, set up Python 3.10.10, install pre-commit, and run pre-commit on all files. The Linux job should depend on Linting, run on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python 3.10.10, install dependencies, test with pytest, generate a coverage report, and upload it to Codecov.
